findings.title: Error code renamed missing_params to missing_param
findings.description: The error code string changed from 'missing_params' (plural) to 'missing_param' (singular) across 3 call sites. While other MCP tools (stack.ts, index.ts) already use the singular form and no internal code references the old plural form, this is a breaking change in the error response wire format for any external consumer matching on the literal string. The PR description does not explicitly flag this as a breaking change.
